brief: Today's news covers controversial immigration enforcement, environmental rollbacks, and AI developments, while papers explore visual analytics, crime linkage, and sign language recognition.
news_summary: The Trump administration pursues deregulation and immigration crackdowns, as ICE operations spark controversy; meanwhile, AI models compete in app-building and New York City bans deceptive subscriptions.
papers_summary: Research includes a dashboard for handling missing data, an industrial study of AI in crime linkage, and a multimodal smart glove for sign language recognition.

en.brief: Today's news covers controversial immigration enforcement, environmental rollbacks, and AI developments, while papers explore visual analytics, crime linkage, and sign language recognition.
en.news_summary: The Trump administration pursues deregulation and immigration crackdowns, as ICE operations spark controversy; meanwhile, AI models compete in app-building and New York City bans deceptive subscriptions.
en.papers_summary: Research includes a dashboard for handling missing data, an industrial study of AI in crime linkage, and a multimodal smart glove for sign language recognition.

zh.brief: 今日中文新闻聚焦福建鞋厂大火致28人遇难、新加坡收养案引发儿童贩运质疑、台风巴威逼近台湾，以及一起罕见的医疗虐待案件。研究方面暂无中文论文报道。
zh.news_summary: 福建晋江鞋厂火灾造成28人死亡，习近平要求严肃追责；新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴疑涉人口贩运；台风巴威逼近台湾，多地停班停课。

todays_image.caption: Sphagnum moss quietly absorbs and preserves the past, much like the buried history of a pardoned sex offender finally unearthed by deportation.
todays_image.title: Sphagnum girgensohnii Russow
